name: Automation Agent
description: Build paid automation jobs for monitoring, reports, workflow triggers, and agent-to-agent tasks.
degenPitch: Paid automations that unlock only after proof.
whatItDoes: Returns task state, audit data, and receipt IDs.
cursorPrompt: Build a paid automation agent using DNA x402. Quote each automation run, verify receipt before execution, return a receipt ID, and keep the example mock-only by default.
suggestedPrompt: Build a paid automation agent using DNA x402. Quote each automation run, verify receipt before execution, return a receipt ID, and keep the example mock-only by default.
receiptProofBehavior: Task retry uses the paid retry path.
Webhook events can notify the requester after completion.
